channel.title: CyberNetSec - Ransomware
channel.description: Latest ransomware threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Conti Ransomware Coder Pleads Guilty in U.S. Court for Wire Fraud Conspiracy
item.description:
Oleksii Oleksiyovych Lytvynenko, a 44-year-old Ukrainian national, has pleaded guilty in a U.S. federal court to conspiracy to commit wire fraud. He admitted to his role in the notorious Conti ransomware gang, which was responsible for over $150 million in ransom payments. Lytvynenko, who was arrest...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Ransomware, Threat Actor, Security Operations

Read Full Article →

item.title: 'The Gentlemen' Ransomware Deploys Self-Propagating Malware in Global RaaS Campaign
item.description:
Microsoft has uncovered a highly sophisticated Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) operation named 'The Gentlemen,' tracked as Storm-2697. This financially motivated group has developed a Go-based ransomware that features robust encryption and, most notably, an aggressive self-propagation module designed...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Threat Actor, Malware

Read Full Article →

item.title: DragonForce Ransomware Gang Claims Attack on Taos Mountain Casino, Stealing SSNs
item.description:
Taos Mountain Casino in New Mexico has confirmed it was the victim of a ransomware attack that resulted in a data breach. The incident, which occurred in late March 2026, was claimed by the DragonForce ransomware group on June 1. The gang alleges it stole 38.63 GB of data, including the names, addre...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Europol Busts 'AudiA6' Crypto Laundering Service Used by Ransomware Gangs
item.description:
An international law enforcement operation led by Europol has taken down 'AudiA6,' a major cryptocurrency laundering service that allegedly washed over €336 million for cybercriminals, primarily ransomware gangs, between 2022 and 2025. The operation resulted in arrests in Georgia, the seizure of ove...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Threat Intelligence, Ransomware, Policy and Compliance

Read Full Article →

item.title: Ransomware Attack on Illinois High School Disables Safety Systems, Forcing Campus Shutdown
item.description:
A ransomware attack on June 7, 2026, forced Evanston Township High School (ETHS) in Illinois to shut down its campus for two days. The cyberattack had a severe physical impact, disabling critical building safety systems including door access controls and public address systems, rendering the school ...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: LockBit 5.0 Ransomware Gang Claims Attack on Singapore's SCB Group
item.description:
The notorious LockBit 5.0 ransomware-as-a-service (RaaS) operation has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack against SCB Group, a construction company based in Singapore. The claim was posted on the group's dark web leak site on June 9, 2026. In a classic double-extortion tactic, the threat actor...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Threat Actor, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: DragonForce Ransomware Targets Chicago Tour Company in Double Extortion Attack
item.description:
The DragonForce ransomware group has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack on Shoreline Sightseeing, a popular Chicago-based boat tour operator. On May 29, 2026, the group listed the company on its dark web leak site, threatening to publish a 'full leak' of stolen data unless a ransom is paid. Th...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Qilin Ransomware Exploits Critical Check Point VPN Zero-Day, CISA Mandates Urgent Patch
item.description:
A critical, actively exploited authentication bypass vulnerability in Check Point's VPN products (CVE-2026-50751) allows attackers to establish a VPN session without a password. The flaw, affecting deprecated IKEv1 configurations, has been linked to attacks by a Qilin ransomware affiliate since earl...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Ransomware, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: ShinyHunters Leaks 234GB of Data from DentaQuest, Affecting 2.6 Million People
item.description:
The extortion group ShinyHunters has leaked a massive 234 GB archive of data allegedly stolen from DentaQuest, a major U.S. dental benefits administrator. The breach, which DentaQuest has acknowledged, impacts approximately 2.6 million individuals. The leaked data includes highly sensitive personal ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Ransomware

Read Full Article →

item.title: TheGentlemen Ransomware Claims Attack on Institucion Cervantes in Argentina
item.description:
The ransomware group known as "TheGentlemen" has claimed responsibility for a cyberattack on Institucion Cervantes, a private higher education institution in Argentina. In a notice dated June 8, 2026, the group threatened to publish a full leak of stolen data if not contacted, employing a typical do...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Data Breach

Read Full Article →
